name: Myseum, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a privacy and social media technology company focused on innovative and creative user platforms. Our flagship platform is Picture Party by Myseum, a next-generation on demand social networking platform that makes it easier and private to share your photos, videos and messages both today, and for generations to come.
